## Meeting Purpose

[Regroup on potential partnership between GrowthX AI and Vanta, discussing pricing, features, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/_FVpRgPj8cMrnGQGqttVPpHaV7SuHnyr?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX AI is experiencing rapid growth (41 employees), nearing the 50-employee threshold for Vanta's pricing tiers](https://fathom.video/share/_FVpRgPj8cMrnGQGqttVPpHaV7SuHnyr?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Yousef is comparing Vanta with competitors (likely Drata) for compliance solutions, with pricing as a key factor](https://fathom.video/share/_FVpRgPj8cMrnGQGqttVPpHaV7SuHnyr?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
  - [Vanta recently launched a "Core Plus" package, offering a middle ground between Core and Enterprise plans](https://fathom.video/share/_FVpRgPj8cMrnGQGqttVPpHaV7SuHnyr?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Decision timeline is pushed to early April, pending internal discussions and budget planning at GrowthX AI](https://fathom.video/share/_FVpRgPj8cMrnGQGqttVPpHaV7SuHnyr?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX AI's Rapid Growth

  - [Current employee count: 41](https://fathom.video/share/_FVpRgPj8cMrnGQGqttVPpHaV7SuHnyr?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Approaching Vanta's 50-employee threshold for pricing tiers](https://fathom.video/share/_FVpRgPj8cMrnGQGqttVPpHaV7SuHnyr?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Growth rate exceeding expectations, potentially hitting 51 employees soon](https://fathom.video/share/_FVpRgPj8cMrnGQGqttVPpHaV7SuHnyr?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Yousef requested pricing details for 51+ employees tier](https://fathom.video/share/_FVpRgPj8cMrnGQGqttVPpHaV7SuHnyr?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)

### Vanta Pricing and Plans

  - Current pricing for \<50 employees: \~$20k for Core, \~$25k with Type 2 SOC 2
  - New "Core Plus" package: $30k for \<50 employees
  - [51-100 employee tier: $35k for Core package](https://fathom.video/share/_FVpRgPj8cMrnGQGqttVPpHaV7SuHnyr?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [Vanta offers multi-year contracts for pricing predictability](https://fathom.video/share/_FVpRgPj8cMrnGQGqttVPpHaV7SuHnyr?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [No surprise cost increases if employee count surpasses 50 after signing](https://fathom.video/share/_FVpRgPj8cMrnGQGqttVPpHaV7SuHnyr?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)

### Feature Comparison and Decision Factors

  - [Yousef views Vanta and competitor (likely Drata) as "a coin flip" in terms of features](https://fathom.video/share/_FVpRgPj8cMrnGQGqttVPpHaV7SuHnyr?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
  - [Access reviews mentioned as a desirable feature](https://fathom.video/share/_FVpRgPj8cMrnGQGqttVPpHaV7SuHnyr?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [GrowthX AI may need features from higher-tier plans, potentially affecting pricing](https://fathom.video/share/_FVpRgPj8cMrnGQGqttVPpHaV7SuHnyr?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [Yousef to provide specific feature requests and pricing targets after internal discussions](https://fathom.video/share/_FVpRgPj8cMrnGQGqttVPpHaV7SuHnyr?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)

### Vanta's New Core Plus Package

  - [Recently launched, includes questionnaire automation and access reviews](https://fathom.video/share/_FVpRgPj8cMrnGQGqttVPpHaV7SuHnyr?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Positioned between Core and Enterprise plans](https://fathom.video/share/_FVpRgPj8cMrnGQGqttVPpHaV7SuHnyr?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Eliza offered to potentially provide Core Plus features at Core pricing](https://fathom.video/share/_FVpRgPj8cMrnGQGqttVPpHaV7SuHnyr?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Pricing Negotiations and Strategy

  - [Yousef not yet ready to negotiate on pricing](https://fathom.video/share/_FVpRgPj8cMrnGQGqttVPpHaV7SuHnyr?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Plans to present a comprehensive ask after internal planning](https://fathom.video/share/_FVpRgPj8cMrnGQGqttVPpHaV7SuHnyr?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
  - [Vanta willing to "sharpen the pencil on pricing" to win the business](https://fathom.video/share/_FVpRgPj8cMrnGQGqttVPpHaV7SuHnyr?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Eliza mentioned a personal connection (her husband is friends with Marcel at GrowthX AI)](https://fathom.video/share/_FVpRgPj8cMrnGQGqttVPpHaV7SuHnyr?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Eliza to send pricing details for the 51+ employee tier](https://fathom.video/share/_FVpRgPj8cMrnGQGqttVPpHaV7SuHnyr?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
  - [Yousef to complete internal planning and present to leadership (including Marcel)](https://fathom.video/share/_FVpRgPj8cMrnGQGqttVPpHaV7SuHnyr?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
  - [Regroup in two weeks (early April) if Yousef doesn't reach out sooner](https://fathom.video/share/_FVpRgPj8cMrnGQGqttVPpHaV7SuHnyr?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [Yousef to provide specific feature requests and pricing targets after internal discussions](https://fathom.video/share/_FVpRgPj8cMrnGQGqttVPpHaV7SuHnyr?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
